title: JobManifest
description: The immutable execution contract for a sandboxed HackBrain job.

status.description: Current state of the job in the execution state machine.

input_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of all input scripts and assets provided to the job before execution.

image_hash.description: Docker image tag or SHA-256 hash defining the strictly isolated container environment.

command.description: The command array to execute within the container (e.g., ['python', 'analyze.py']).

mount_spec.description: The explicit volume mount string binding the host job directory to the container /job/workdir.

artifact_manifest.description: Array of artifact hashes generated and sealed by this job.
